params.label: Image to correct
params.tip: Select which image version to apply AF correction to.

params.label: Channel combinations
params.tip: Add one entry per channel. Set the AF reference channels (Division channels) for each.

params.label: Channel to correct
params.tip: The channel whose autofluorescence will be corrected.

params.label: Division channels (AF reference)
params.tip: Channels whose signal is used as the autofluorescence reference for correction.

params.label: Correction mode
params.tip: How to apply the AF correction: divide the channel by the reference.

params.label: Channel percentile
params.tip: Percentile used to subtract background from the target channel before correction.

params.label: Correction percentile
params.tip: Percentile used to subtract background from the reference (AF) channel.

params.label: Summary mode
params.tip: How multiple reference channels are combined into a single AF image.

params.label: Summary percentile
params.tip: Percentile used when Summary mode is Percentile.

params.label: Correction min percentile
params.tip: Lower percentile for rescaling the corrected image.

params.label: Correction max percentile
params.tip: Upper percentile for rescaling the corrected image.

params.label: Generate inverse channel
params.tip: Add an inverse-corrected channel to the output (reverses the AF ratio).

params.label: Median filter radius
params.tip: Apply a median filter of this half-width after correction (0 = off).

params.label: Top-hat radius
params.tip: Apply white top-hat background subtraction of this radius (0 = off).

params.label: Rolling ball radius
params.tip: Apply rolling ball background subtraction of this radius (0 = off).

params.label: Rolling ball padding
params.tip: Edge padding (pixels) used when cropping for rolling ball subtraction.

params.label: Denoise method
params.tip: Apply a denoising filter to this channel before AF correction.

params.label: Wavelet method
params.tip: Wavelet thresholding method (used when Denoise method = Wavelet).

params.label: Wavelet mode
params.tip: Wavelet thresholding mode (used when Denoise method = Wavelet).

params.label: TV weight
params.tip: Total-variation denoising weight (used when Denoise method = TV).

params.label: Apply Gaussian to corrected channels
params.tip: Apply a Gaussian smoothing filter after AF correction.

params.label: Apply Gaussian to uncorrected channels
params.tip: Apply Gaussian smoothing to channels that have no AF combination defined.
